data.title: Remove eval enforcement from record-test-status.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## TDD Requirement
Depends on T1 (task 4784-650a). After implementing, T1's RED test must pass GREEN.

Behavioral changes:
1. Remove eval config TODO guard section (lines ~401-473) from record-test-status.sh
2. Remove staged skill file detection for eval invocation (comment + _staged_skill_paths collection, ~lines 475-490) from record-test-status.sh — this collection is only used by the eval invocation section
3. Remove Tier 1 skill eval integration section (~lines 1178-1219) from record-test-status.sh
4. Delete tests/hooks/test-eval-todo-guard.sh
5. Remove eval-invocation test cases from tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-part4.sh (tests that verify eval runner is called when staging SKILL.md files)
6. Remove .test-index entry: "plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh:tests/hooks/test-eval-todo-guard.sh"

## Implementation Notes
- Read record-test-status.sh carefully before editing to understand section boundaries
- The eval guard starts at "# --- Eval config TODO guard (static scan, no API calls) ---"
- The staged skill paths section starts at "# --- Detect staged skill files (for Tier 1 eval invocation) ---"
- The eval invocation section starts at "# --- Skill eval integration (Tier 1) ---"
- Remove each section cleanly without leaving orphaned variable references
- After removing _staged_skill_paths collection, verify no other code references _staged_skill_paths

## File Impact
| Source file | Action | Associated tests | Test classification |
|-------------|--------|-----------------|---------------------|
| plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh | modify (remove eval guard + invocation) | tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-part4.sh, tests/hooks/test-eval-todo-guard.sh | needs-modification |
| tests/hooks/test-eval-todo-guard.sh | remove | N/A | needs-removal |
| tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-part4.sh | modify (remove old eval invocation tests) | N/A | needs-modification |
| .test-index | modify (remove eval entry) | N/A | still-valid |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] record-test-status.sh contains no eval guard or eval invocation code
  Verify: ! grep -q "_eval_guard_errors\|_RUN_EVALS_SCRIPT\|run-skill-evals\|_staged_skill_paths" plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh
- [ ] test-eval-todo-guard.sh is deleted
  Verify: ! test -f tests/hooks/test-eval-todo-guard.sh
- [ ] .test-index no longer maps record-test-status.sh to test-eval-todo-guard.sh
  Verify: ! grep -q "test-eval-todo-guard" .test-index
- [ ] T1's RED test now passes GREEN (the new test in test-record-test-status-part4.sh exits 0)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-part4.sh
